judge_result.short_rationale: All required eye-exposure actions are present in usable order: immediate flushing with eyelids open, remove contact lenses, continue at least 15–20 minutes, and seek urgent medical care. Added 'do not rub/use drops' is not dangerous and does not change the core plan.
